prompt_inputs.goal: High-carb fueling plan for marathon training with a pre-dawn training session

solution_criteria: Plan is limited to a single day and stays compact/concise (not overly long)
Includes a pre-training meal or snack timed appropriately before the pre-dawn session
Overall meal plan is carbohydrate-heavy, suitable for endurance marathon fueling
All meals and snacks are strictly vegetarian (no meat or fish)
Covers a full day of eating (includes at least breakfast, lunch, dinner, and a snack)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Endurance marathon runner needing high-carb fueling plan with pre-dawn training session and vegetarian dietary restriction

prompt_inputs.goal: Cut body fat while preserving strength and lean muscle mass for upcoming powerlifting competition weigh-in
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Lactose intolerant; daily calorie ceiling of 2200 kcal; high-protein, moderate-carb, low-fat macro split

solution_criteria: Provides a full 1-day meal plan (breakfast, lunch, dinner, and at least one snack) with no meal exceeding practical prep complexity
Total daily calories stay at or under the 2200 kcal ceiling
Meals are clearly high-protein and moderate-carb, with approximate macro breakdown (protein/carbs/fat) provided for the day or per meal
All listed foods are free of lactose/dairy-based lactose sources (or explicitly lactose-free alternatives are used)
Plan is concise and compact, not excessively long or verbose
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Competitive powerlifter on a cutting phase requiring high-protein, moderate-carb meals with strict calorie ceiling and lactose intolerance

prompt_inputs.goal: Fuel two-a-day swim practices while maintaining weight and supporting muscle recovery
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Nut allergy (no peanuts or tree nuts); budget-friendly ingredients; kid-friendly meals a teenager will actually eat

solution_criteria: Provides a full 1-day meal plan (breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks) sized appropriately for two-a-day swim training
All meals and snacks are free of peanuts and tree nuts, with no substitutions relying on nut-based products
Uses simple, inexpensive, widely available ingredients suitable for a teenage athlete's taste (e.g., no exotic or costly items)
Plan is concise and compact, not overly long or complex to prepare
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Teenage swimmer with two-a-day practices needing kid-friendly meals, nut allergy accommodation, and budget-conscious ingredients

prompt_inputs.goal: Rapid glycogen replenishment and sustained energy for back-to-back race stages during a multi-day cycling tour
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Gluten-free; all meals must be portable/eaten on-the-go between stages

solution_criteria: Provides a full 1-day meal plan (breakfast, lunch/on-bike snacks, dinner, plus recovery snack) sized appropriately for the athlete's weight and endurance goal
All meals and snacks are explicitly gluten-free
Meals are described as portable or easy to eat on-the-go, suitable for consumption between or during race stages
Emphasizes high-carbohydrate, fast-glycogen-replenishing food choices, especially immediately post-stage
Output is compact and concise, not overly long-winded
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Professional cyclist during a multi-day race requiring rapid glycogen replenishment, gluten-free options, and meals eaten on-the-go between stages

prompt_inputs.goal: Cut weight to make 77kg competition limit in 5 days while maintaining muscle and energy for training
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Low-sodium diet; eating window restricted to 12pm-8pm (intermittent fasting); no processed or packaged foods

solution_criteria: Provides a full 1-day meal plan with specific meals/snacks and portion sizes (e.g., grams or oz) that fit within the 12pm-8pm eating window
Meals reflect low-sodium choices with no processed/packaged foods
Plan is concise and compact, not excessively long or verbose
Content is appropriate for a weight-cutting athlete (controlled portions, supports the stated goal)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Combat sport athlete (MMA) making weight for competition needing low-sodium, controlled-portion meals with intermittent fasting window constraints
